title: phaethon-chimera: Frustrated UTAC Systems & Chimera States (GenesisAeon Package 35)
description: GenesisAeon Package 35 — UTAC modelling of asteroid 3200 Phaethon as a frustrated chimera system. Implements: FrustratedUTAC ODE (dH/dt = r·H·(1-H/K)·tanh(σΓ) + A·cos(ω_p·t)), Kuramoto-order-parameter chimera detector, SOC avalanche statistics (τ ≈ 1.3), stochastic dust emission model (P_emit ≈ 0.23 per orbit), and 47 quantitative predictions for the DESTINY+ JAXA mission (flyby 2029). CREP coupling: Γ_phaethon ≈ 0.165 — between Amazon (0.116) and AMOC (0.251). Connects to P31 (v_RIG), P32 (β-clustering), P36 (S_A/S_V duality), P38 (Φ^{1/3} scaling).
